{{Infobox location
| name = Huun
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Huun]] is a desert planet.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Huun]] is sparsely populated and serves as a meeting-place for outlaws, exiles, and travelers.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Huun]] has a [[World Spirit]] that emerges from slumber every few decades.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
